---
name: Benny's Issue Template
about: This is the custom template for Lab 3
title: '**[Issue]**:'
labels: ''
assignees: ''
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        Thanks for marking this issue for us.
  - type: upload
    id: screenshots
    attributes:
      label: Upload screenshots
      description: Add screenshots, if applicable.
    validations:
      required: false
---
